styling_rules.borders: 2px solid #121212 (border-2 border-[#121212]) on all interactive elements, cards, and bottom nav
styling_rules.shadows: Solid offset shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212]) instead of soft blurs to create a trendy, tactile, physical feel
styling_rules.radius: Generous rounded corners (rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl) to soften the brutalist borders and keep it friendly
styling_rules.spacing: Generous padding, p-6 or p-8 inside cards. The UI should feel chunky and touch-friendly.

components.buttons: Thick borders, solid offset shadow, bright pastel background (e.g., bg-[#FFE270] or bg-[#FF7A9F]), active:translate-y-[4px] active:translate-x-[4px] active:shadow-none transition-all duration-150
components.inputs: Shadcn input customized heavily: border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-xl bg-white focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:bg-[#FFF9F0] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212] focus:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#121212] text-lg p-6
components.photo_card: Polaroid style: bg-white, border-2 border-[#121212], shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#121212], rounded-xl. Large square photo area with a small caption area below. Tilted slightly (e.g., -rotate-2 or rotate-2) to feel organic and casual.
components.bottom_nav: Floating pill-shaped nav at bottom center. bg-white, border-2 border-[#121212], shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212], rounded-full. Contains Lucide icons with high contrast states.

layout_patterns.feed: Vertical scrolling feed of photo cards. Ensure the background color is visible (bg-[#FFF9F0]). Wide gap between items (gap-8 or gap-12).
layout_patterns.camera: Large viewfinder occupying most of the screen. Rounded corners (rounded-3xl) with a thick border. Below it, a massive circular capture button (bg-white border-4 border-[#121212] w-20 h-20 rounded-full active:scale-95).
layout_patterns.pairing: Centered layout for onboarding. Use the provided app_logo. Large typography. Use a 6-digit code input display.
layout_patterns.notifications: Simple list of alerts. Highlight 'partner is waiting' in the primary pastel color.

logo.description: App logo: interlocking hearts / soft padlock in pastel yellow and peach. Used on pairing screen and header.

sample_photos.description: Couple mirror selfie for the feed
Aesthetic coffee POV for the feed
Couple selfie in store for the feed

animations.hover: Not as relevant for mobile, but on tap: elements compress using translate and remove shadow.
animations.reactions: When a user reacts (heart/like), animate a small floating emoji moving upwards using Framer Motion.
animations.page_transition: Use Framer Motion to slide tabs sideways or slide up for modal/camera screens.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first web app using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
Ensure the app feels like a native mobile app (use h-screen, overflow-hidden on root, and internal scrolling for feeds).
Implement the Neo-Brutalist soft pastel theme exactly as specified: strict 2px #121212 borders and sharp offset shadows (#121212).
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in index.html/css.
Primary Navigation: A fixed bottom tab bar with 3 tabs (Camera, Feed/Gallery, Notifications) using Lucide icons.
Camera Feature: You can use HTML5 camera API or build a mocked viewfinder (a large UI square with camera UI overlays) that 'captures' by picking one of the sample_photos.
Feed Feature: Show a list of polaroid-style cards. Each card has a photo, a short caption, and a reaction button.
Pairing Screen: Implement a simple UI simulating the entering of a shared code to connect accounts.
Notification Screen: Show simulated alerts (e.g., 'Partner sent a photo!', 'Daily reminder: send a photo').
Ensure all interactive elements and buttons have data-testid attributes for testing.
